performanceLevels.label: Not Tested
performanceLevels.description: The student has not yet been assessed.

performanceLevels.label: Below Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.

performanceLevels.label: Approaching Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.

performanceLevels.label: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates a solid understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may require minimal support to improve performance.

performanceLevels.label: Exemplary
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.

studentSupportPerformanceLevelsDerivedFr.label: Students Who Need Extensive Support
studentSupportPerformanceLevelsDerivedFr.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.

studentSupportPerformanceLevelsDerivedFr.label: Students Who Need Some Support
studentSupportPerformanceLevelsDerivedFr.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.

studentSupportPerformanceLevelsDerivedFr.label: Students on track for Proficiency
studentSupportPerformanceLevelsDerivedFr.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.

components.title: 3.RF.1
components.description: Know and apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills in decoding words.

performanceLevels.label: Below Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.
skills: Struggles to apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills.
Has difficulty decoding unfamiliar words, often guessing based on context or pictures.
Reads in a halting manner, with frequent pauses and repetitions.

performanceLevels.label: Approaching Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.
skills: Applies grade-level phonics and word analysis skills with some assistance.
Decodes unfamiliar words with occasional assistance.
Reads with some fluency, but may pause or hesitate.

performanceLevels.label: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates a solid understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may require minimal support to improve performance.
skills: Applies grade-level phonics and word analysis skills accurately.
Decodes unfamiliar words with minimal assistance.
Reads with fluency and comprehension appropriate for grade level.

performanceLevels.label: Exemplary
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.
skills: Applies grade-level phonics and word analysis skills with exceptional accuracy.
Decodes unfamiliar words independently and with ease.
Reads with advanced fluency and comprehension beyond grade level.

components.title: 3.RF.2
components.description: Read with sufficient accuracy and fluency to support comprehension.

performanceLevels.label: Below Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.
skills: Reads grade-level text with frequent errors and limited comprehension.
Struggles to decode unfamiliar words, often guessing based on context or pictures.
Reads in a halting manner, with frequent pauses and repetitions.

performanceLevels.label: Approaching Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.
skills: Reads grade-level text with some errors and partial comprehension.
Decodes unfamiliar words with occasional assistance.
Reads with some fluency, but may pause or hesitate.

performanceLevels.label: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates a solid understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may require minimal support to improve performance.
skills: Reads grade-level text with accuracy and comprehension.
Decodes unfamiliar words independently.
Reads with fluency and expression.

performanceLevels.label: Exemplary
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.
skills: Reads grade-level text with exceptional accuracy and comprehension.
Decodes unfamiliar words with ease and precision.
Reads with advanced fluency and expression.

components.title: 3.RF.3
components.description: Know and apply grade-level phonics and word analysis skills in decoding words.

performanceLevels.label: Below Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.
skills: Struggles to decode words with common prefixes and suffixes.
Has difficulty recognizing and decoding multisyllabic words.
Relies heavily on context clues to decode words.

performanceLevels.label: Approaching Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.
skills: Decodes words with common prefixes and suffixes with some assistance.
Recognizes and decodes some multisyllabic words with support.
Uses context clues to decode words, but may struggle with accuracy.

performanceLevels.label: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates a solid understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may require minimal support to improve performance.
skills: Decodes words with common prefixes and suffixes independently.
Recognizes and decodes multisyllabic words with minimal support.
Uses context clues effectively to decode words.

performanceLevels.label: Exemplary
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.
skills: Decodes words with common prefixes and suffixes with ease and precision.
Recognizes and decodes multisyllabic words independently and accurately.
Uses context clues skillfully to decode words, even in complex texts.

components.title: 3.RF.4
components.description: Read with sufficient accuracy and fluency to support comprehension.

performanceLevels.label: Below Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.
skills: Struggles to read with sufficient accuracy and fluency.
Has difficulty comprehending texts independently.
Requires significant support to improve reading performance.

performanceLevels.label: Approaching Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.
skills: Reads with some accuracy and fluency, but may struggle with complex texts.
Comprehends texts with some support.
Requires some support to improve reading performance.

performanceLevels.label: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates a solid understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may require minimal support to improve performance.
skills: Reads with sufficient accuracy and fluency to support comprehension.
Comprehends texts independently with minimal support.
Applies reading strategies effectively to improve performance.

performanceLevels.label: Exemplary
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.
skills: Reads with exceptional accuracy and fluency.
Comprehends complex texts independently.
Applies advanced reading strategies to enhance performance.

components.title: 3.RL.1
components.description: Ask and answer questions to demonstrate understanding of a text, referring explicitly to the text as the basis for the answers.

performanceLevels.label: Below Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates limited understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may struggle to complete tasks and may require significant support to improve performance.
skills: Struggles to read with sufficient accuracy and fluency.
Has difficulty comprehending texts independently.
Requires significant support to improve reading performance.

performanceLevels.label: Approaching Proficiency
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates partial understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student may require some support to improve performance.
skills: Reads with some accuracy and fluency, but may struggle with complex texts.
Comprehends texts with some support.
Requires some support to improve reading performance.

performanceLevels.label: Proficient
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates a solid understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may require minimal support to improve performance.
skills: Reads with sufficient accuracy and fluency to support comprehension.
Comprehends texts independently with minimal support.
Applies reading strategies effectively to improve performance.

performanceLevels.label: Exemplary
performanceLevels.description: The student demonstrates an exceptional understanding and application of the concepts and skills assessed. The student can complete tasks independently and may exceed expectations in performance.
skills: Reads with exceptional accuracy and fluency.
Comprehends complex texts independently.
Applies advanced reading strategies to enhance performance.
